title: Umami British Vegan Scotch Egg
description: A dense and satisfying vegan scotch egg featuring a castelvetrano olive and soffritto-based filling, wrapped in a crispy oat-based breading.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup vegan egg substitute (such as Ener-G Egg Replacer)

instructions: Prepare the soffritto base by finely chopping the onion and sautéing it in a pan over medium heat until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the tomato paste and smoked paprika to the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped castelvetrano olives and cook for an additional 1 minute.
In a separate bowl, mix together the oat flour, nutritional yeast, salt, and black pepper.
Add the soffritto base to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into a ball and flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Dip the disk into the oat flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Carefully place the coated disk into the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining mixture to form 2-3 scotch eggs.
